title: Describe this street market.
alt: A bright morning market street with fruit stands and people walking
easy: This picture shows a busy market in the morning. Many people are walking around and looking at fresh fruit. The sellers seem friendly, and the street feels colorful and lively.
advanced: The image captures a vibrant open-air market where shoppers are moving through a lively street lined with fresh produce. The bright colors, relaxed expressions, and natural light create a warm and energetic atmosphere.

title: Describe this cafe scene.
alt: A cozy cafe with people talking by the window
easy: This picture shows a small cafe with a warm atmosphere. Some people are talking, and the place looks quiet and comfortable.
advanced: The scene presents an intimate cafe interior where relaxed conversation, warm lighting, and soft window light create a calm and welcoming atmosphere.

title: Describe this rainy city walk.
alt: A rainy city street with umbrellas and reflections
easy: This picture shows a rainy city street. People are walking with umbrellas, and the road looks shiny because of the rain.
advanced: The image captures an urban street on a rainy day, where umbrellas, reflections, and passing movement create a moody yet lively city atmosphere.
